cleavage agent: digestion of samples with side-chain-modified porcine trypsin
enrichment method: based on affinity capture mass spectrometry
fractionation method: in parallel with high pH reversed phase fractionation
instrument: on an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: labeled with distinct iTRAQ labels in an eight-plex format
reduction reagent: in the presence of 5 mM tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)
reduction concentration: in the presence of 5 mM tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP)
